REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1516 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Chan for Surrethea Lewis (Administrator).

Ms. Chan stated that the Adminisrtator will allow up to 30-days for close of escrow. The sale was confirmed at $570,000.00 to Dylan Benjamin subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 13, 2012. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for December 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1516 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Chan for Surrethea Lewis.

Ms. Chan requested a two week continuance to do proof of publication. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
